name: opencode-copilot-meter
description: OpenCode plugin that tracks per-turn Copilot token usage, premium request billing, and remaining quota.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target node --external node:fs && bunx tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --outDir dist
scripts.install:plugin: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; execSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pwsh local-install.ps1 --build' : 'bash local-install.sh --build', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.copilot:show-token: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; execSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pwsh scripts/copilot-show-token.ps1' : 'bash scripts/copilot-show-token.sh', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.copilot:set-token: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; execSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pwsh scripts/copilot-set-token.ps1' : 'bash scripts/copilot-set-token.sh', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.copilot:set-quota-endpoint: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; execSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pwsh scripts/copilot-set-quota-endpoint.ps1' : 'bash scripts/copilot-set-quota-endpoint.sh', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.copilot:show-quota: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; execSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pwsh scripts/copilot-show-quota.ps1' : 'bash scripts/copilot-show-quota.sh', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
